title: Smaller Particles
description: Scales the most obstructive particles down by 50%!
body:
# Notice

**I've started doing Minecraft comissions in my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Ce6Vty6khA)!**

**This project won't be updated. There is a better & more flexible solution — [my ParticleResizer mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/particleresizer).**

# Smaller Particles

## About
Ever felt that some particles take too much space on your screen? This pack solves the issue by reducing their size by 50%.

## Notes
- Feel free to use this resource pack anywhere, but credit would be appreciated!
